summary: Comprehensive testing of LeadFlow AI iteration 3. All base44 SDK migrations verified. Backend: 31/31 tests pass. Frontend: All 10 pages load correctly, session persistence works, AI chat with Claude responding, InsightsPanel, SystemHealthBadge, Settings API tab all functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Showing 1 to 0 of 0 results' when no leads exist. Should show '0 to 0' or hide pagination when total=0

issues: Input fields use type='password' which shows dots for the masked API key values returned from backend. Users cannot see their masked keys. Consider using type='text' for showing masked values and password for editing.

backend_tests: POST /api/auth/register creates new user with token
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns token
GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user data
GET /api/leads/stats returns total_leads, hot_leads, contacted, replies
POST /api/leads creates lead with correct fields
POST /api/leads + GET verifies persistence in DB
GET /api/ai/insights returns insights array with type/title/body fields
GET /api/user/settings after save returns masked values
frontend_tests: Login page loads with correct branding and form
Login with email/password works and redirects to Dashboard
Session persists after page reload - stays on Dashboard
Dashboard loads with 4 stat cards (Total Leads, Hot Opportunities, Drafts, Emails Sent)
SystemHealthBadge shows 'System Healthy'
Active Signals badge visible in header
InsightsPanel loads with Monara daily insights
Copilot page loads with empty state (no drafts)
Campaigns page loads with empty state
Unibox page loads with empty state
CommandCenter/Monara loads with welcome message and quick actions
Monara chat input is functional and accepts text
Monara AI responds to 'How many leads do I have?' via Claude API
Contacts page loads with empty state and correct table headers
Settings page loads with Organization tab and tab bar
Settings API tab shows Trigify, Unipile, Netrows input fields
Settings Save API Keys button is present and clickable
LeadDatabase loads with filter panel (Monthly Credits, Job Title, Location, Keywords, Industries)
LeadDatabase search button is functional
LeadDatabase Netrows stub works (MOCKED as expected)

mocked_confirmed: LeadDatabase Netrows B2B search - returns empty results with 'configure Netrows API key' message
Unibox send message - shows toast 'Message queued (send functionality coming soon)'
Contacts email enrichment - shows toast 'Email enrichment coming soon'
action_items: Minor: Fix Contacts pagination to show '0 to 0 of 0 results' instead of '1 to 0 of 0 results' when total=0. Fix: change `((page - 1) * LEADS_PER_PAGE) + 1` to `Math.max(0, (page - 1) * LEADS_PER_PAGE + (total > 0 ? 1 : 0))`
Enhancement (optional): Settings API inputs are type='password' so masked backend values appear as '****' dots. Could use type='text' to show 'test****' style masked value to confirm key is saved.
critical_code_review_comments: Contacts.jsx: Pagination formula shows '1 to 0 of 0' when empty. Minor cosmetic fix needed.
api/client.js: VITE_API_URL is empty string - proxy-based routing is correct for this Vite setup. Works in dev; make sure production deployment sets the correct URL.
ai_chat.py: claude-sonnet-4-5 model name - verified working with Anthropic key. Model responds correctly.
leads.py: PATCH /api/leads/{id} returns {message: 'Lead updated'} instead of full LeadResponse. Minor inconsistency but functional.
AuthProvider.jsx: Session persistence verified working correctly - localStorage token stored, /api/auth/me validated on load.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, minor pagination UI bug in Contacts)

seed_data_creation: Created test users: uitest_leadflow@example.com (frontend), plus multiple test_iter3_* and test_reg_*/test_login_* users from backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All base44 SDK migrations complete and verified. Backend 31/31 tests pass including new endpoints: /api/ai/insights, /api/ai/chat, PATCH /api/leads/{id}, POST /api/leads, GET/POST /api/user/settings. Frontend session persistence fixed (localStorage token + /api/auth/me check on load). All 10 pages load correctly. Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI chat working. Mocked APIs confirmed: Netrows search, Unibox send, email enrichment. Test credentials: uitest_leadflow@example.com / UITest123!. Minor remaining issue: Contacts pagination shows '1 to 0 of 0 results' when empty.
